name: CTP Cluj-Napoca
notes: The Cluj GTFS is seeded from external.gtfs.ro's CLUJ.zip (the mdb-2121 mirror; route/stop/shape structure is stable but the schedule is stale by months). We REPLACE calendar/trips/stop_times.txt with fresh data scraped daily from ctpcj.ro's CSV timetables, then re-pack the zip. Routes without CSV data fall back to the seed's trips.
